subject: Office printer shows offline on Mac only
description: Printer works for colleagues on Windows; this Mac shows printer offline in Print dialog.

ts_steps.title: Ping and queue
ts_steps.action: Print another printer or PDF to isolate; open CUPS queue and clear stuck jobs.

ts_steps.title: Remove and re-add
ts_steps.action: System Settings → Printers & Scanners — remove printer, add by IP or correct driver (AirPrint vs vendor).

ts_steps.title: Driver update
ts_steps.action: Install latest vendor driver; avoid duplicate queue names from migration.

internal_information: Wrong driver, IP change, or paused queue. LPD vs IPP path matters on some networks.
